title: LATAM Diagnostic Lab Integration Gap
problem: Diagnostic labs (blood work, imaging, pathology) in LATAM operate disconnected from ordering physicians. Orders sent via paper or fax. Results returned via email/PDF with no structured data. No real-time status tracking. Patients wait weeks for results. Physicians spend hours manually transcribing lab data into EMRs.
solution: Lab integration platform connecting diagnostic labs with ordering physicians. Electronic ordering, structured results delivery, real-time status tracking, automatic EMR integration. API-first for lab information systems (LIS). Patient portal for result access.
technology: HL7/FHIR integration, LIS API connections, structured data extraction from PDFs (OCR + ML), patient portal, physician dashboard
target_customer: Diagnostic lab networks, hospital systems, independent physicians, radiology centers
ai_type: OCR for PDF extraction, ML for result interpretation
regulatory_notes: Laboratory licensing, medical data privacy regulations in each country
varden_fit: HIGH FIT - Classic infrastructure middleware. Lab integration is boring but essential. Build once, deploy to hundreds of labs. Recurring revenue model.
notes: BOREALING: Lab integration is the definition of boring software. But it's essential infrastructure. This is solved in US/EU but missing in LATAM. Huge opportunity for middleware player.
